body_html:
Peg's list of documents to be delivered

From: "Peg Ugland" <pegu@naproperty.com>

Subject: LIST OF ITEMS NEEDED.docx

Darren,

When speaking with ASW, she pretty much wants everything.  The attached is the last of what I could think of.  There are probably other items which are not on the list.  Please ask if you come across something.
